candidates.blocker_source: AGLS to NZGLS/DCAT crosswalk for trans-Tasman metadata imports
candidates.name: Australian Government Locator Service
candidates.notes: Useful for AU-to-NZ corpus transfer and Isaacus-adjacent datasets.
candidates.relevance: Commonwealth metadata vocabulary adjacent to NZ public-sector cataloguing.

candidates.blocker_source: crosswalk from extraction manifests to Catala scopes and definitions
candidates.name: Catala
candidates.notes: Keep as downstream mapping target; do not add runtime dependency.
candidates.relevance: Legislative programming language with statute-oriented structure.

candidates.blocker_source: publication manifest exporter mapping repo release metadata to data.govt.nz fields
candidates.name: data.govt.nz Dataset Metadata
candidates.notes: Complements DCAT and NZGLS for local publication readiness.
candidates.relevance: Practical dataset publication fields for NZ legal data outputs.

candidates.blocker_source: reviewed downstream interview-flow use case and extraction-to-question mapping
candidates.name: Docassemble
candidates.notes: Useful later for guidance UI, not core ontology registry implementation.
candidates.relevance: Eligibility/interview flow modelling for legal guidance applications.

candidates.blocker_source: commercial runtime and no immediate open ontology intake benefit
candidates.name: ErgoAI / Flora-2 rule knowledge representation
candidates.notes: Reject for now; avoid commercial runtime coupling.
candidates.relevance: Rule reasoning design reference for legal/enterprise knowledge bases.

candidates.blocker_source: not broadly relevant to legislative ontology intake
candidates.name: Financial Instrument Global Identifier
candidates.notes: Too domain-specific for core Track 28; revisit only for financial-market corpora.
candidates.relevance: Financial instrument identifiers for securities-related legislation only.

candidates.blocker_source: curated bibliography with reusable ontology pattern summaries
candidates.name: JURIX legal ontology patterns
candidates.notes: Monitor for Track 30 mapping inference and legal reasoning design.
candidates.relevance: European legal knowledge representation and reasoning patterns.

candidates.authority: New Zealand Legislation Design and Advisory Committee
candidates.blocker_source: controlled concept inventory from Legislation Guidelines headings and examples
candidates.name: Legislation Guidelines metadata concepts
candidates.notes: Use as NZ-specific extraction taxonomy seed, not as executable legal advice.
candidates.relevance: NZ legislative design concepts for classification, commencement, amendment, and repeal.

candidates.blocker_source: reviewed bibliography and extracted ontology pattern inventory
candidates.name: Legal knowledge graph ontology patterns
candidates.notes: Do not import publisher text; use as monitored design reference.
candidates.relevance: Design patterns for legal knowledge graph construction and ontology alignment.

candidates.blocker_source: field-level crosswalk from NZGLS metadata to DCAT/DCAT-AP catalog records
candidates.name: New Zealand Government Locator Service
candidates.notes: Highest-value NZ-specific metadata addition for dataset publication.
candidates.relevance: NZ public-sector metadata for discoverable datasets and government resources.

candidates.blocker_source: no authoritative source identified during Track 28 intake
candidates.name: STOICA rules-as-code reference
candidates.notes: Do not add until a concrete, authoritative source is provided.
candidates.relevance: Mentioned as possible rules-as-code tooling but not verified as an authoritative ontology.

candidates.blocker_source: crosswalk from deontic extraction families to ODRL duties/prohibitions
candidates.name: ODRL Information Model
candidates.notes: Map deontic outputs cautiously; ODRL is not a full legal reasoning ontology.
candidates.relevance: Rights, permissions, prohibitions, duties, and policy constraints vocabulary.

candidates.blocker_source: local OWL profile for extracted legislative concepts and ontology mappings
candidates.name: OWL 2 Web Ontology Language
candidates.notes: Core substrate for Track 29 and Track 30 ontology mapping work.
candidates.relevance: Formal ontology modelling for standards alignment and inference tracks.

candidates.blocker_source: RDF 1.2 serializer compatibility review across current rdflib outputs
candidates.name: RDF 1.2 Concepts and Abstract Syntax
candidates.notes: Use as graph baseline; keep existing RDF/Turtle exports compatible.
candidates.relevance: Graph interchange model for ontology mapping, provenance, and publication.

candidates.blocker_source: SHACL shape set for extraction manifests and ontology graph exports
candidates.name: SHACL
candidates.notes: Useful before Track 29 graph publication and Track 44 data quality gates.
candidates.relevance: Validation layer for ontology manifests, graph exports, and extraction outputs.

candidates.blocker_source: analytics measurement model for Track 32 statistics and quality metrics
candidates.name: SOSA/SSN
candidates.notes: Valuable later for analytics provenance; not core to legislation extraction.
candidates.relevance: Observation and measurement model for corpus analytics and quality metrics.
